mapper.insert: insert into event_decisions(event_id,fingerprint,incident_id,decision_type,duplicate,occurrence_count,actions_json,reason,decided_at) values(#{decision.eventId},#{decision.fingerprint},#{decision.incidentId},#{decision.decisionType},#{decision.duplicate},#{decision.occurrenceCount},coalesce(cast(#{decision.actionsJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb),#{decision.reason},#{decision.decidedAt}) on conflict(event_id) do update set fingerprint=excluded.fingerprint,incident_id=excluded.incident_id,decision_type=excluded.decision_type,duplicate=excluded.duplicate,occurrence_count=excluded.occurrence_count,actions_json=excluded.actions_json,reason=excluded.reason,decided_at=excluded.decided_at
mapper.select: select event_id,fingerprint,incident_id,decision_type,duplicate,occurrence_count,actions_json,reason,decided_at from event_decisions order by decided_at desc limit #{limit}
